common.tagline: Delivering the romance of small town travel.

onboarding.hero_title_new: Choose the Mood of Your Trip
onboarding.hero_title_edit: Rechoose the Mood of Your Trip
onboarding.hero_desc_new: Lovv will transform your familiar big-city preferences into cozy South Korean small towns.
onboarding.hero_desc_edit: New preferences will be saved and applied to your next AI itinerary.
onboarding.choose_subtitle: Choose Your Travel Style by City Vibes
onboarding.cancel_edit: Cancel and Return to My Page
onboarding.limit_reached_notice: You can select up to 3 themes.
onboarding.limitations_notice: The current MVP saves only Google mock sessions and travel preference hints, not full chat logs.
onboarding.limitations_notice_edit: Previous preferences will remain active until saved.

healing_rest.label: Hot Springs & Spa
healing_rest.description: Prioritize relaxing scenes like cozy accommodations, hot springs, and spas.

sea_coast.label: Sea & Coast
sea_coast.description: Prefer small towns with emerald waters, beach strolls, and peaceful resorts.

history_tradition.label: History & Tradition
history_tradition.description: Select routes highlighting temples, old alleys, and local traditions.

food_local.label: Food & Local
food_local.description: Tailor your trip around markets, local tables, and historic eateries.

nature_trekking.label: Nature & Trekking
nature_trekking.description: Focus on walking rhythms like forests, mountains, waterfalls, and viewpoints.

art_sense.label: Art & Vibe
art_sense.description: Enjoy scenes worth documenting like crafts, gardens, cafes, and exhibitions.

healing_rest.editorialNote: Focus on hot water like Onyang Hot Springs, cozy lodging, and slow recovery.

sea_coast.editorialNote: Prioritize trips where the beach and sea breeze come first, valuing ocean walks.

history_tradition.editorialNote: Slowly follow the trace of historic sites, old alleys, and tradition like Gyeongju.

food_local.editorialNote: Travel along markets and alley tables, focusing on signature local foods.

nature_trekking.editorialNote: Prioritize walking rhythms, mountain scenery, waterfalls, and forests like Hallasan.

art_sense.editorialNote: A journey to slowly view and capture the atmosphere of cafes, beaches, and gardens.

feedback.title: What did you like about this itinerary?
feedback.guide_note: Tap ➔ add preference · Tap again ➔ remove · "Not interested" ➔ lowers theme exposure, saved to account
feedback.notice_positive: Feedback applied! Vibe added to your preferences.
feedback.notice_negative: Negative feedback recorded! Theme exposure will be lowered.
